content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Introduces structured unpredictability—students don’t know exactly what will unfold.
✔ Aligns gameplay with classic RPG hidden mechanics.
✔ Gives the professor full control over hidden influences.

📜 3. Deciding The Weekly Leader (Professor’s Role)

📜 Students will determine which professor role takes over through a cryptic selection method.

✔ Each professor role has three thematic questions tied to literary and philosophical dilemmas.
✔ The students vote on answers without knowing which role they are selecting.
✔ The majority-selected response determines the professor’s weekly function.

📖 Example: Cryptic Leader Selection
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 404 (chunk 404/555)
